concepts.title: heterogeneous
concepts.quote: Heterogeneous catalysis describes catalytic reactions in which the catalyst occupies a different phase from the reactants, most often a solid catalyst acting on gas or liquid reactants.

concepts.title: catalysis
concepts.quote: Heterogeneous catalysis describes catalytic reactions in which the catalyst occupies a different phase from the reactants, most often a solid catalyst acting on gas or liquid reactants.

concepts.title: Gerhard Ertl
concepts.quote: Gerhard Ertl received the Nobel prize in chemistry for elucidating the surface chemistry of ammonia synthesis on iron.
